step_rationale: Proteolytic agrin fragment released during myocardial injury; predicts acute kidney injury post-AMI.
mechanism: A proteolytic agrin fragment that marks myocardial necrosis and predicts post-infarction acute kidney injury through systemic inflammatory and ischemic stress pathways.

references.title: C-terminal fragment of agrin (CAF) levels predict acute kidney injury after acute myocardial infarction.
